overview: Medi Bot is a professional AI-powered medical chatbot that lets users ask health questions, explore symptoms, and get quick medical information in a polished conversational interface with dark/light mode support.
features: Conversational medical chatbot with user and bot chat bubbles
Quick-start suggestion cards for common medical queries
Medical disclaimer banner for safe usage awareness
Dark and light mode toggle with system preference detection
Clear chat history with confirmation dialog
AI-powered responses via backend HTTP outcalls
Smooth auto-scroll and timestamps on all messages
